response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering skills and strong communication abilities, he fundamentally lacks the core requirements for this capital markets C++ role. His C++ experience is minimal and outdated (last significant work in 2015, now 10+ years ago), he has no Windows platform background, and critically, he has zero domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income. His recent career trajectory has moved entirely toward full-stack web development with TypeScript and Node.js, making him a poor fit despite his overall technical excellence.
strengths: Proven polyglot developer with 15+ years of experience and strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and testing fundamentals
Excellent communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through multiple technical talks, workshops, and open-source community leadership
Full-stack engineer with demonstrated ability to quickly master new technology stacks and lead across diverse technical domains
concerns: Minimal C++ experience with last significant work in 2015; current expertise is entirely web/backend technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript)
No Windows platform development experience; entire recent career is Linux-based and web-focused development
Zero domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial derivatives

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated learning velocity and engineering rigor
